definition: A systematic error in thinking that affects decisions and judgments.
example_sentence: Her cognitive bias led her to only seek information that confirmed her existing beliefs.
context_sentence: Studies show that cognitive bias can influence even trained professionals.

definition: A communication technique that requires fully concentrating on the speaker rather than just passively hearing.
example_sentence: The therapist used active listening by repeating back what the patient had said.
context_sentence: Active listening is essential in customer service environments.

definition: A person or group with an interest or concern in a business or organisation.
example_sentence: All major stakeholders were invited to the annual review meeting.
context_sentence: The report was prepared with input from every key stakeholder.
